info.description: Build a brand-new page yourself by stacking sections. Pick a title, give it a slug (the URL), then add as many sections as you like — heroes, text blocks, image+text splits, galleries, image pairs, full-bleed photos, CTAs, FAQs and more. Each section has style options (background colour, padding, alignment, background image).

title.description: Page title (shown in the browser tab and used for the heading if your first section doesn't set one).

slug.description: The URL this page lives at. The page becomes /p/<slug>. Lowercase letters and dashes only. Strapi fills this for you when you save.

hero_image.description: Cover image used when this page is shared on social or shown in a listing. Not displayed on the page itself unless you add a Hero or Full-bleed image section. Recommended 1600x900.

summary.description: One-line summary used as the meta description for Google and as the preview text in social shares. About 155 characters.

sections.description: The page itself. Click 'Add a component to sections' to start. You can drag sections to reorder. Each section has its own Style block for background colour, padding, and alignment.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Use the 'Generate SEO' button if available, then edit.

og_image.description: Optional social-share image override. Leave blank to use the Hero image above.

sort_order.description: Used if these pages are listed somewhere. Lower numbers appear first. Leave 0 if you don't have a listing.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely.
